hero.headline: FEEL GOOD IN YOUR SKIN
hero.subhead: Modern laser and skin treatments, delivered by a team that takes your time and your comfort seriously.

approach.headline: FDA-CLEARED TECH
approach.body: We use clinically established laser and skin devices, run by trained operators who understand the science behind them.

approach.headline: TRAINED SPECIALISTS
approach.body: Every treatment is performed by a certified technician. No upselling, no rushing.

approach.headline: EVERY SKIN TONE
approach.body: Our protocols are tuned for the full range of skin types, including darker tones that legacy lasers struggle with.

approach.headline: CLEAR PRICING
approach.body: Per-session and package prices are listed up front. You'll never get surprised at checkout.

services.name: Laser Hair Removal
services.description: Targeted, lasting reduction of unwanted hair across most body areas. Works on a wide range of skin tones.

services.name: Laser Facials
services.description: Non-invasive facial treatments that brighten skin, soften texture, and reduce visible redness, with no downtime.

services.name: Microneedling
services.description: Tiny controlled micro-channels stimulate the skin's own collagen response. Helpful for scars, pores, and skin tone.

services.name: Injectables
services.description: Conservative, natural-looking neuromodulator and dermal filler treatments performed by licensed providers.
